name: DKCTF Hard Mode – independent P2 test 2
notes: Second isolated in-game test. Keeps the P2 slot bit and prevents Hard Mode from clearing the separate state byte at +0x26AF that gates the independent P2 path. P2 character preservation is still not addressed.

entries.description: Do not clear the +0x26AF state byte during Hard Mode initialization. Replaces STRB WZR, [X19, X8] with NOP.
Preserve an already active P2 slot bit while Hard Mode initializes the active-slot mask.
